description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a pronounced, twisted green stem on top. The front face is intricately carved with menacing, slanted eyes and a jagged, toothy mouth, giving it a classic Halloween jack-o'-lantern appearance. The carving is deep, exposing the hollow interior and creating sharp, dramatic shadows within the facial features. The pumpkin's surface is smooth with subtle vertical ridges and a matte finish, while the stem appears textured and slightly glossy. The back and sides of the pumpkin are uncarved, displaying the natural, ribbed pumpkin skin. No additional decorative accessories are present, and the pumpkin is shown isolated against a plain background.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a twisted green stem and a sinister jack-o'-lantern face, featuring smooth, ribbed sides and a hollow interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved, angry eyes and jagged mouth, with the green stem visible at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the uncarved, ribbed pumpkin surface and a partial glimpse of the mouth cutout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uncarved pumpkin skin and the full green stem.
description_view_3: Right side view with the uncarved surface and a partial view of the mouth cutout.
attribute_carving_pattern: The pumpkin is carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style with sharply angled, menacing eyes and a wide, jagged mouth featuring pointed teeth. The pattern is expressive and designed to evoke a spooky or sinister face, with deep cutouts and no additional surface etchings or geometric motifs.
